- conditions:
    all:
    - op: exists
      value: null
      var: item.resourcesAffected.s3BucketDetails.defaultServerSideEncryption
    - op: in
      value: '[''aws:kms'', ''AES256'']'
      var: item.resourcesAffected.s3BucketDetails.defaultServerSideEncryption.encryptionType
    - op: exists
      value: null
      var: item.resourcesAffected.s3BucketDetails.defaultServerSideEncryption.kmsMasterKeyId
  for_each: aws.macie.list_findings
  rule_id: aws.macie.findings.macie_logs_centralized_and_encrypted

    var: item.classificationDetails.result.sensitiveDataOccurrences.retentionDays
  for_each: aws.macie.list_findings
  rule_id: aws.macie.findings.retention_days_minimum
  severity: LOW

    op: equals
    value: ENABLED
    var: item.status
  for_each: aws.macie.list_findings
  rule_id: aws.macie.status.check
  severity: HIGH

check_rule_yaml:
- conditions:
    all:
    - op: exists
      value: null
      var: item.AccessPolicies
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.NodeToNodeEncryptionOptions.Enabled
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.EncryptionAtRestOptions.Enabled
  for_each: aws.opensearch.describe_domain
  rule_id: aws.opensearch.service.domains_access_control_enabled
  severity: MEDIUM
- conditions:
    op: equals
    value: true
    var: item.LogPublishingOptions.AUDIT_LOGS.Enabled
  for_each: aws.opensearch.describe_domain
  rule_id: aws.opensearch.service.domains_audit_logging_enabled
  severity: MEDIUM
- conditions:
    all:
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.LogPublishingOptions.ES_APPLICATION_LOGS.Enabled
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.LogPublishingOptions.SEARCH_SLOW_LOGS.Enabled
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.LogPublishingOptions.INDEX_SLOW_LOGS.Enabled
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.LogPublishingOptions.AUDIT_LOGS.Enabled
  for_each: aws.opensearch.describe_domain
  rule_id: aws.opensearch.service.domains_cloudwatch_logging_enabled
  severity: MEDIUM
- conditions:
    op: equals
    value: true
    var: item.EncryptionAtRestOptions.Enabled
  for_each: aws.opensearch.describe_domain
  rule_id: aws.opensearch.service.domains_encryption_at_rest_enabled
  severity: HIGH
- conditions:
    all:
    - op: greater_than
      value: 3
      var: item.ClusterConfig.InstanceCount
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.ClusterConfig.ZoneAwarenessEnabled
  for_each: aws.opensearch.describe_domain
  rule_id: aws.opensearch.service.domains_fault_tolerant_data_nodes_configured
  severity: MEDIUM
- conditions:
    all:
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.ClusterConfig.DedicatedMasterEnabled
    - op: equals
      value: true
      var: item.ClusterConfig.ZoneAwarenessEnabled
    - op: exists
      value: null
      var: item.ClusterConfig.DedicatedMasterType
    - op: greater_than
      value: 3
